channel.title: porter.cat
channel.description: I'm Porter, a software engineer and designer. I write about web development, networking, and other things I find interesting.

item.title: Lets see what we can do with rehype pretty code
item.description: Syntax highlighting, line numbers, line highlights, word highlights oh boy!

item.title: Git: This repository has moved. Please use the new location...
item.description: What to do when you change your git repo url on GitHub or other providers
